<channel|>import * as fs from 'fs';

class PriorityQueue<T> {
    private heap: T[] = [];
    private compare: (a: T, b: T) => number;

    constructor(compare: (a: T, b: T) => number) {
        this.compare = compare;
    }

    push(val: T) {
        this.heap.push(val);
        this.siftUp(this.heap.length - 1);
    }

    pop(): T | undefined {
        if (this.isEmpty()) return undefined;
        const top = this.heap[0];
        const last = this.heap.pop()!;
        if (this.heap.length > 0) {
            this.heap[0] = last;
            this.siftDown(0);
        }
        return top;
    }

    isEmpty() {
        return this.heap.length === 0;
    }

    private siftUp(index: number) {
        while (index > 0) {
            const parent = (index - 1) >> 1;
            if (this.compare(this.heap[index], this.heap[parent]) < 0) {
                [this.heap[index], this.heap[parent]] = [this.heap[parent], this.heap[index]];
                index = parent;
            } else break;
        }
    }

    private siftDown(index: number) {
        while (true) {
            let smallest = index;
            const left = index * 2 + 1;
            const right = index * 2 + 2;

            if (left < this.heap.length && this.compare(this.heap[left], this.heap[smallest]) < 0) {
                smallest = left;
            }
            if (right < this.heap.length && this.compare(this.heap[right], this.heap[smallest]) < 0) {
                smallest = right;
            }
            if (smallest !== index) {
                [this.heap[index], this.heap[smallest]] = [this.heap[smallest], this.heap[index]];
                index = smallest;
            } else break;
        }
    }
}

function solve() {
    const input = fs.readFileSync(0, "utf8").split(/\s+/);
    let idx = 0;
    if (input[0] === "") idx++;

    const N = parseInt(input[idx++]);
    const M = parseInt(input[idx++]);
    if (isNaN(N)) return;

    const tasks = new Array(N);
    const nameToIndex = new Map<string, number>();
    const indexToName = new Array(N);

    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
        const name = input[idx++];
        tasks[i] = name;
        nameToIndex.set(name, i);
        indexToName[i] = name;
    }

    const adj: number[][] = Array.from({ length: N }, () => []);
    const inDegree = new Int32Array(N).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < M; i++) {
        const uName = input[idx++];
        const vName = input[idx++];
        const u = nameToIndex.get(uName)!;
        const v = nameToIndex.get(vName)!;
        adj[u].push(v);
        inDegree[v]++;
    }

    const pq = new PriorityQueue<number>((a, b) => indexToName[a].localeCompare(indexToname[b]));
    // Note: Since we need lexicographical order of task NAMES, and names are strings,
    // we store the names directly in the PQ or store indices and compare names.

}

```typescript
import * as fs from 'fs';

class PriorityQueue<T> {
    private heap: T[] = [];
    private compare: (a: T, b: T) => number;
    constructor(compare: (a: T, b: T) => number) { this.compare = compare; }
    push(val: T) {
        this.heap.push(val);
        let idx = this.heap.length - 1;
        while (idx > 0) {
            const p = (idx - 1) >> 1;
            if (this.compare(this.heap[idx], this.heap[p]) < 0) {
                [this.heap[idx], this.heap[p]] = [this.heap[p], this.heap[idx]];
                idx = p;
            } else break;
        }
    }
    pop(): T | undefined {
        if (this.heap.length === 0) return undefined;
        const top = this.heap[0];
        const last = this.heap.pop()!;
        if (this.heap.length > 0) {
            this.heap[0] = last;
            let idx = 0;
            while (true) {
                let smallest = idx;
                const l = idx * 2 + 1, r = idx * 2 + 2;
                if (l < this.heap.length && this.compare(this.heap[l], this.heap[smallest]) < 0) smallest = l;
                if (r < this.heap.length && this.compare(this.heap[r], this.heap[smallest]) < 0) smallest = r;
                if (smallest !== idx) {
                    [this.heap[idx], this.heap[smallest]] = [this.heap[smallest], this.heap[idx]];
                    idx = smallest;
                } else break;
            }
        }
        return top;
    }
    isEmpty() { return this.heap.length === 0; }
}

function solve() {
    const input = fs.readFileSync(0, "utf8").split(/\s+/);
    let idx = 0;
    while (input[idx] === "") idx++;
    if (idx >= input.length) return;

    const N = parseInt(input[idx++]);
    const M = parseInt(input[idx++]);
    const tasks = new Array(N);
    const inDegree = new Int32Array(N).fill(0);
    const taskToIdx = new Map<string, number>();
    const idxToTask = new Array(N);

    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
        const name = input[idx++];
        tasks[i] = name;
        taskToIdx.set(name, i);
        idxToTask[i] = name;
    }

    const adj = Array.from({ length: N }, () => [] as number[]);
    for (let i = 0; i < M; i++) {
        const uName = input[idx++];
        const vName = input[idx++];
        const u = taskToIdx.get(uName)!;
        const v = taskToIdx.get(vName)!;
        adj[u].push(v);
        inDegree[v]++;
    }

    const pq = new PriorityQueue<string>((a, b) => a < b ? -1 : (a > b ? 1 : 0));
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
        if (inDegree[i] === 0) pq.push(idxToTask[i]);
    }

    const result: string[] = [];
    while (!pq.isEmpty()) {
        const uName = pq.pop()!;
        result.push(uName);
        const u = taskToIdx.get(uName)!;
        for (const v of adj[u]) {
            inDegree[v]--;
            if (inDegree[v] === 0) pq.push(idxToTask[v]);
        }
    }

    if (result.length === N) {
        process.stdout.write(result.join(" ") + "\n");
    } else {
        process.stdout.write("IMPOSSIBLE\n");
    }
}

solve();
```
